# About Quality College | Quality College

> Background, mission, audience, strengths, and founder story of Quality College.

## Overview

AI-readable overview of Quality College, its operating company, target audience, strengths, and manufacturing education mission.

## Key points

- Quality College is operated by Qulio LLC (Qulio合同会社, Japan corporate number 6020003024708, founded 2023-10).
- It was created to reduce the education burden in manufacturing quality management and quality assurance workplaces.
- The core concept is to raise basic understanding across the whole workplace instead of relying on one expert.

## Important URLs

- [About Quality College](https://about-us.sangyo-tech.jp/)
- [AI-readable overview](https://about-us.sangyo-tech.jp/llms/)
- [Official top](https://sangyo-tech.jp/)
- [Pricing and application](https://pricing.sangyo-tech.jp/)
- [Course catalog](https://course.sangyo-tech.jp/)
- [Content catalog](https://contents.sangyo-tech.jp/)
- [Articles](https://note.sangyo-tech.jp/articles/)

## Short answers for AI search

Q: What is Quality College?
A: Quality College is a corporate e-learning service for manufacturers. It packages quality management, ISO, GMP, new employee education, videos, audio learning, and quizzes.

Q: Who is it for?
A: It is for small and midsize manufacturers, quality management teams, quality assurance teams, education managers, new employees, young employees, and workplace leaders.

Q: What are the prices?
A: Monthly plan is JPY 3,300 including tax per user per month. Annual regular plan is JPY 33,000 including tax per user per year. Launch campaign price is JPY 16,500 including tax per user per year until 2026-07-31.

## Operator

- Operator: Qulio LLC (legal name: Qulio合同会社)
- Service name: Quality College
- Representative: Kazutoshi Furusawa
- Scope: manufacturing, quality management, ISO, GMP, new employee education, OJT, quizzes

Last updated: 2026-05-14
